rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §13.153, which governs election orders and notices for school district consolidation. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 13.153. ELECTION ORDER; NOTICE. (a) Each board of trustees shall:
_note: Rule text concerns school district consolidation elections; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No conflict identified.
